sections.sectionTitle: Judah Kumpi Josiah leh Thukham Laibu

verses.text: Josiah in uk ding a kipatin kum giat pha a, amah in Jerusalem-ah kum sawmthumlekhat sung uk hi. Ama nu' min Jedidah hi a, Bozkath khuami Adaiah' tanu ahi hi
Topa' mitah amah a manin gamta-in, a pu David' khekhap khempeuh zui cinten a, themkhat zong piallo hi
Kumpi Josiah' kum sawmlegiatna kumin, kumpipa in a lai-atpa Meshullam' tapa Azaliah, a tapa Shafan, Topa' biakinn-ah sawl a
“Kongcingte in mite tung panin a khop uh ahi Topa' biakinn sungah hong kipaipih sum phazah a theihna dingin siampi lianpenpa Hilkiah kiangah paito in
Tua ciangin Topa' biakinn nasemte tungah a sum piasak in. Topa' biakinn-ah a om inn a puah nasemte tungah amaute tua sum piasak in
Tua sumte pen khutsiamte, innlamte, leh leilesuang innlam siamte tungah piak ding leh biakinn puahna dingin sing leina ding leh suang tawhna ding zong ahi hi
Ahih hangin thuman takin amaute gamta uh ahih manin amaute' khutsungah a kipia sumte hangin amaute tung panin sazian kingenlo ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin siampi lianpenpa Hilkiah in lai-atpa Shafan kiangah, “ Topa' biakinn sungah thukham laibu ka mu hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Hilkiah in Shafan kiangah a laibu pia a, amah in a sim hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa kiangah lai-atpa Shafan hong pai-in thu zasak a, “Nasemte in biakinn sungah a om sumte lakhia-in Topa' biakinn nasemte tungah pia khinzo uh hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin lai-atpa Shafan in kumpipa kiangah, “Siampi Hilkiah in laibu khat kei hong pia hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Shafan in kumpipa mai-ah tua laibu a sim hi
Kumpipa in thukham laibu sunga thute a zak ciangin a dahna hangin a puante a balkek hi
Tua ciangin kumpipa in siampi Hilkiah, Shafan' tapa Ahikam, Mikaiah' tapa Akbor, lai-atpa Shafan, leh kumpipa' nasem Asaiah thu pia a

“Pai un la, a kimu hih laibu sunga thute tawh kisai-in keima-a' ding, mite-a' ding, leh Judah mi khempeuh-a' dingin Topa' tungah thu va dong un; bang hang hiam cih leh hih laibu sunga thu, eite tawh kisai-in a kigelh khempeuh bangin gamtat ding i pu i pate in na manglo uh ahih manin eite tungah Topa' hehna lian hi,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin siampi Hilkiah, Ahikam, Akbor, Shafan, leh Asaiah-te zong Harhas tapa Tikvah, a tapa Shallum, biakinn puan a kempa' zi kamsangnu Huldah kiangah a pai uh hi (tua laitakin Jerusalem khuasung a Veng Nihna-ah tuanu teng hi); tua ciangin tuanu tawh amaute kiho uh hi
Tua ciangin amah in amaute kiangah, “Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Kei kiangah note hong sawl mipa kiangah gen un
Topa in hih bangin ci hi: En un, hih lai mun leh a tungah a tengte tungah Judah kumpipa in laibu sunga a sim siatna thute khempeuh ka tungsak ding hi

Bang hang hiam cih leh amaute in kei hong nusia-in pasian dangte tungah paknamtui hal uh a, amau khut tawh a bawl milimte tawh kei hong hehsak uh ahih manin hih mun tungah ka hehna so ding a, ka hehna dailo ding hi

Ahih hangin Topa' tungah thu a dong dingin note a hong sawl Judah kumpipa tungah ahih leh note in hih bangin na gen ding uh hi. Israel Pasian, Topa in hih bangin ci hi: Nangmah in na zaksa thute tawh kisai-in

amaute gamkhing leh samsiat a ngahte a suahna dingin hih mun leh a tungah a teng mite tungah ka kampauna na zak ciangin na lungsim kisikin Topa' mai-ah nangmahmah kiniamkhiatin, na puante balkekin ka mai-ah na kahna thu, keimah in zong ka za hi, Topa in ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin, nangmah in nuamtakin na han na zuan ding a, hih mun tungah ka tun'sak ding siatna khempeuh na mit in mulo ding hi,’ ci hi,” a ci hi. Tua ciangin amaute in kumpipa kiangah tua thu a puakkik uh hi.
